name: renku
description: Renku filmmaking skills for screenplay development, and movie-making workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Movie-making skills for writers and filmmakers.
interface.longDescription: Renku is a filmmaking skills library for Codex and Claude Code. Its Screenplay Drafter skill helps writers develop story arcs, cast, locations, and formal screenplay pages as persisted Renku Studio screenplay JSON that Studio can render and visualize.
defaultPrompt: Use Renku to help with this movie-making workflow.
For screenplay work, use $screenplay-drafter to author persisted Renku Studio screenplay JSON.
